Bash(python3 -c " import json with open\(''/Users/jason/.claude/projects/-Users-jason-genesis-engine/9279cede-2f6d-4884-9c6f-f75e143bc53c.jsonl''\) as f: for line in f: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\(''type''\) == ''queue-operation'' and ''CONSCIOUS'' in obj.get\(''content'',''''\): print\(obj[''content'']\) break ")

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re
html = open\('/Users/jason/genesis-engine/genesis-3d.html'\).read\(\)
# Only grab plain <script> tags \(no type attribute\)
scripts = re.findall\(r'<script\\s*>\(.*?\)</script>', html, re.DOTALL\)
js = '\\n'.join\(scripts\)
open\('/tmp/genesis_check.js', 'w'\).write\(js\)
print\(f'Extracted {len\(scripts\)} JS script blocks, {len\(js.splitlines\(\)\)} lines'\)
PYEOF
node --check /tmp/genesis_check.js 2>&1)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re
html = open\('/Users/jason/genesis-engine/genesis-3d.html'\).read\(\)
scripts = re.findall\(r'<script type="module">\(.*?\)</script>', html, re.DOTALL\)
js = '\\n'.join\(scripts\)
open\('/tmp/genesis_check.mjs', 'w'\).write\(js\)
print\(f'{len\(js.splitlines\(\)\)} JS lines extracted'\)
PYEOF
node --check /tmp/genesis_check.mjs 2>&1 && echo "SYNTAX OK"
wc -l /Users/jason/genesis-engine/genesis-3d.html)
